summary: Loading Skeletons Implementation Testing Complete. All skeleton components properly integrated into async sections. GlobalFieldSection shows SectionSkeleton during data load (19 skeleton elements detected). RTL Hebrew layout maintained. All tabs render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: LoadingSkeletons.js provides 8 reusable skeleton components (SectionSkeleton, CardSkeleton, StatsSkeleton, ChartSkeleton, ListSkeleton, InlineLoader, CollectiveSkeleton, ReplaySkeleton)
GOOD: All skeleton components include dir='rtl' for Hebrew RTL layout support
GOOD: Consistent animate-pulse bg-gray-200 styling across all skeletons
GOOD: CollectiveMirrorSection properly shows CollectiveSkeleton during loading state
GOOD: CollectiveTrajectorySection properly shows CollectiveSkeleton during loading state
GOOD: GlobalFieldSection properly shows SectionSkeleton during loading state
GOOD: ReplayInsightsSummarySection conditionally shows ReplaySkeleton only when replayCount > 0 (prevents skeleton flash for new users)
GOOD: All sections properly handle error states with Hebrew error messages
GOOD: ESLint passes on all skeleton-related files
seed_data_creation: Created test decision via Home tab action input
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loading skeletons only visible briefly during async data fetch. Collective sections (CollectiveMirrorSection, CollectiveTrajectorySection) require user history to render - they return null if no history exists. ReplayInsightsSummarySection only shows skeleton when replayCount > 0. GlobalFieldSection always renders (shows collective data). Test by clearing localStorage or using fresh session.

skeleton_integration_tests.test: Skeleton CSS classes present in page
skeleton_integration_tests.details: animate-pulse and bg-gray-200 found in page HTML

skeleton_integration_tests.test: All tabs render correctly after loading

skeleton_integration_tests.details: dir='rtl' found on sections: collective-mirror-section, collective-layer-section, collective-trends-section, global-field-section

skeleton_integration_tests.details: All sections display correctly with proper Hebrew text and styling

conditional_rendering_tests.behavior: Shows collective data with Hebrew labels

integration_points.ReplayInsightsSummarySection: Uses ReplaySkeleton when loading=true AND replayCount > 0
